title: peucedanum arenarium subsp. urbani
intro: Peucedanum arenarium subsp. urbani, also known as Urban's Masterwort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the carrot family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Urban's Masterwort include its ability to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, such as bloating and cramps, as well as its potential to reduce fever and improve respiratory health. The plant is typically prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential applications.
